title: stipa occidentalis var. minor
intro: Stipa occidentalis var. minor, also known as Little Western Needlegrass, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Stipa occidentalis var. minor include its potential to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
